summary: Iteration 177 testing complete: Gate Notifications Enhancement. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: useGateNotifications hook active without errors, auto-travel recording works for all 5 realms, Energy Gates UI renders correctly with 5 gate cards, all 12 TradeCircle tabs functional, Dashboard loads without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: useGateNotifications hook properly implements ROUTE_TO_REALM mapping for 5 routes
Travel recording is idempotent (uses $addToSet in MongoDB)
Gate notification toast only fires on can_unlock transition (comparing against localStorage cache)
First app load initializes cache without showing toasts (hasInitRef pattern)
Hook is called in AnimatedRoutes component (App.js line 171)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 177 Gate Notifications enhancement fully working. Test user grad_test_522@test.com has all 5 realms visited (starseed_journey, refinement_lab, cosmic_mixer, dream_realms, trade_circle). Travel requirements met for all gates. User stats: consciousness_level=1, 0 polished gems, 100 dust, 0 trades, 0 credits. Gate of Earth shows consciousness met but polished gems not met (0/1).

backend_apis.POST /api/energy-gates/travel: Records valid realm visits, rejects invalid realms with 400, idempotent (same realm recorded once)
backend_apis.GET /api/energy-gates/travel-log: Returns realms_visited array, all_realms (5 total), total_visited, total_realms
backend_apis.GET /api/energy-gates/status: Returns gates with travel progress data, user_stats includes realms_visited

frontend_gate_notifications.hook_active: useGateNotifications called in AnimatedRoutes (App.js line 171) without console errors
frontend_gate_notifications.energy_gates_ui: 5 gate cards rendered with progress bars, user stats (Gems, Dust, Trades, Level)
frontend_gate_notifications.trade_circle_tabs: All 12 tabs working: Browse, Gates, Broker, Forge, Content, Escrow, Genesis, God Mode, Avatar, My Listings, Offers, Karma
frontend_gate_notifications.dashboard_page: Loads without errors (hook doesn't break other pages)

gate_notification_behavior.toast_trigger: Only fires when gate transitions from can_unlock=false to can_unlock=true
gate_notification_behavior.cache_mechanism: Uses localStorage key 'cosmic_gate_status' to track previous state
gate_notification_behavior.first_load: Initializes cache without showing toasts (hasInitRef pattern)
gate_notification_behavior.check_interval: 60 seconds periodic check + on route changes
